title: ITALY enforcement action against Poste Italiane S.p.a. (6,624,000)
summary: Non-compliance with general data processing principles The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 6,624,000 on Poste Italiane S.p.a. The controller operated a banking application and used the ThreatMetrix fraud prevention tool. Use of the tool was mandatory for customers using the controller's banking app. The tool had been configured in s...
